Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const r=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT to_regclass\('\\''public.draft_pick_audit_log'\\''\)::text AS t"\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const r=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='\\''public'\\'' AND table_name='\\''draft_pick_audit_log'\\'' ORDER BY ordinal_position"\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\);const idx=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname='\\''public'\\'' AND tablename='\\''draft_pick_audit_log'\\''"\);console.log\('\\''INDEXES:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(idx\)\);const fk=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='\\''public.draft_pick_audit_log'\\''::regclass"\);console.log\('\\''CONSTRAINTS:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(fk\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const c=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\(\);const resolved=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT migration_name, finished_at, applied_steps_count FROM _prisma_migrations WHERE migration_name='\\''20260423183000_draft_pick_audit_log'\\''"\);console.log\('\\''row count in table:'\\'',c\);console.log\('\\''migration record:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(resolved,null,2\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''f94e2e9e-f366-4a91-95de-3e56819db053'\\'';const count=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\({where:{leagueId}}\);const ds=await p.draftSession.findUnique\({where:{leagueId},select:{id:true,status:true,draftType:true,rounds:true,teamCount:true,pausedByUserId:true,startedAt:true,completedAt:true,_count:{select:{picks:true}}}}\);const league=await p.league.findUnique\({where:{id:leagueId},select:{id:true,name:true,userId:true,sport:true,lifecycleState:true}}\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\({leagueId,auditCountBefore:count,league,draftSession:ds},null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagues=await p.league.findMany\({select:{id:true,name:true,lifecycleState:true,createdAt:true,userId:true},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},take:10}\);const users=await p.user.count\(\);const sessions=await p.draftSession.count\(\);console.log\('\\''userCount:'\\'',users\);console.log\('\\''draftSessionCount:'\\'',sessions\);console.log\('\\''recent leagues:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(leagues,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagues=await p.league.findMany\({select:{id:true,name:true,lifecycleState:true,createdAt:true,userId:true},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},take:10}\);const sessions=await p.draftSession.count\(\);console.log\('\\''draftSessionCount:'\\'',sessions\);console.log\('\\''recent leagues:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(leagues,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const raw=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT id, name, \\"lifecycleState\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"userId\\" FROM leagues WHERE id = '\\''f94e2e9e-f366-4a91-95de-3e56819db053'\\'' OR \\"createdAt\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '\\''30 minutes'\\'' ORDER BY \\"createdAt\\" DESC"\);const sess=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT id, \\"leagueId\\", status, \\"draftType\\", rounds, \\"teamCount\\", \\"createdAt\\" FROM draft_sessions WHERE \\"leagueId\\" = '\\''f94e2e9e-f366-4a91-95de-3e56819db053'\\'' OR \\"createdAt\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '\\''30 minutes'\\''"\);console.log\('\\''leagues:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw,null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''sessions:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(sess,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const dupes=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT \\"draftId\\", \\"idempotencyKey\\", COUNT\(*\) as c FROM redraft_draft_events WHERE \\"idempotencyKey\\" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY \\"draftId\\", \\"idempotencyKey\\" HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1 LIMIT 20"\);const totalRows=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM redraft_draft_events'\\''\);const sdcRows=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM "SportsDataCache"'\\''\);console.log\('\\''redraft_draft_events total rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(totalRows\)\);console.log\('\\''SportsDataCache total rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(sdcRows\)\);console.log\('\\''duplicate \(draftId, idempotencyKey\) groups:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(dupes,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const dupes=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT \\"draftId\\", \\"idempotencyKey\\", COUNT\(*\)::int as c FROM redraft_draft_events WHERE \\"idempotencyKey\\" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY \\"draftId\\", \\"idempotencyKey\\" HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1 LIMIT 20"\);const totalRows=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int as c FROM redraft_draft_events'\\''\);const sdcRows=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int as c FROM "SportsDataCache"'\\''\);console.log\('\\''redraft_draft_events total rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(totalRows\)\);console.log\('\\''SportsDataCache total rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(sdcRows\)\);console.log\('\\''duplicate \(draftId, idempotencyKey\) groups:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(dupes,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const ups=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='\\''public'\\'' AND table_name='\\''user_profiles'\\'' AND column_name='\\''chimmy_tts_voice_id'\\''"\);const aud=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT to_regclass\('\\''public.draft_pick_audit_log'\\''\)::text AS t"\);const dplCount=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\({where:{leagueId:'\\''dfa9d61d-178d-433f-b399-1a033048037e'\\''}}\);console.log\('\\''chimmy_tts_voice_id exists:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(ups\)\);console.log\('\\''audit table:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(aud\)\);console.log\('\\''audit row count for old league:'\\'',dplCount\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\'';const league=await p.league.findUnique\({where:{id:leagueId},select:{id:true,name:true,lifecycleState:true,userId:true}}\);const rosters=await p.roster.findMany\({where:{leagueId},select:{id:true,teamName:true,platformUserId:true},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''asc'\\''}}\);const ds=await p.draftSession.findUnique\({where:{leagueId},select:{id:true,status:true,draftType:true,slotOrder:true,teamCount:true,_count:{select:{picks:true}}}}\);console.log\('\\''league:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(league,null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''roster count:'\\'',rosters.length\);console.log\('\\''first 3 rosters:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(rosters.slice\(0,3\),null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''draftSession.status:'\\'',ds?.status\);console.log\('\\''draftSession.teamCount:'\\'',ds?.teamCount\);console.log\('\\''first 3 slotOrder entries:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(Array.isArray\(ds?.slotOrder\)?ds.slotOrder.slice\(0,3\):ds?.slotOrder,null,2\)\);const intersect=new Set\(rosters.map\(r=>r.id\)\);const slotOrderIds=\(Array.isArray\(ds?.slotOrder\)?ds.slotOrder:[]\).map\(s=>s.rosterId\);const mismatches=slotOrderIds.filter\(id=>!intersect.has\(id\)\);console.log\('\\''slotOrder rosterIds not in roster table:'\\'',mismatches.length,'\\''/'\\'',slotOrderIds.length\);console.log\('\\''mismatch sample:'\\'',mismatches.slice\(0,3\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\'';const league=await p.league.findUnique\({where:{id:leagueId},select:{id:true,name:true,lifecycleState:true}}\);const rosters=await p.roster.findMany\({where:{leagueId},select:{id:true,platformUserId:true}}\);const ds=await p.draftSession.findUnique\({where:{leagueId},select:{status:true,teamCount:true,slotOrder:true}}\);console.log\('\\''league:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(league\)\);console.log\('\\''roster count:'\\'',rosters.length\);console.log\('\\''first 3 rosters:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(rosters.slice\(0,3\)\)\);console.log\('\\''draftSession.status:'\\'',ds?.status\);console.log\('\\''draftSession.teamCount:'\\'',ds?.teamCount\);console.log\('\\''first 3 slotOrder:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(Array.isArray\(ds?.slotOrder\)?ds.slotOrder.slice\(0,3\):ds?.slotOrder\)\);const rosterIds=new Set\(rosters.map\(r=>r.id\)\);const slotOrderIds=\(Array.isArray\(ds?.slotOrder\)?ds.slotOrder:[]\).map\(s=>s.rosterId\);const mismatches=slotOrderIds.filter\(id=>!rosterIds.has\(id\)\);console.log\('\\''slotOrder rosterIds not in roster table:'\\'',mismatches.length,'\\''/'\\'',slotOrderIds.length\);console.log\('\\''mismatch sample:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(mismatches.slice\(0,3\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\'';const auditCount=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\({where:{leagueId}}\);const latestAudit=await p.draftPickAuditLog.findMany\({where:{leagueId},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},take:3,select:{id:true,action:true,overallPickNumber:true,createdAt:true,reason:true,newPlayerName:true}}\);const picks=await p.draftPick.findMany\({where:{session:{leagueId}},select:{id:true,overall:true,playerName:true,position:true,rosterId:true,createdAt:true},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},take:3}\);console.log\('\\''audit count:'\\'',auditCount\);console.log\('\\''latest audit rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(latestAudit,null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''latest picks:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(picks,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\'';const count=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\({where:{leagueId}}\);const rows=await p.draftPickAuditLog.findMany\({where:{leagueId},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},select:{id:true,action:true,overallPickNumber:true,newPlayerName:true,reason:true,createdAt:true,actorUserId:true}}\);const picks=await p.draftPick.findMany\({where:{session:{leagueId}},select:{overall:true,playerName:true,rosterId:true},orderBy:{overall:'\\''asc'\\''}}\);console.log\('\\''audit count:'\\'',count\);console.log\('\\''audit rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''picks:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(picks,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const raw1=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT current_database\(\) as db, current_setting\('\\''server_version'\\''\) as ver"\);const raw2=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c FROM draft_pick_audit_log"\);const raw3=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c FROM draft_pick_audit_log WHERE league_id='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\''"\);const raw4=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c, MIN\(created_at\) AS first, MAX\(created_at\) AS last FROM draft_pick_audit_log"\);const raw5=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c FROM draft_picks WHERE session_id IN \(SELECT id FROM draft_sessions WHERE \\"leagueId\\"='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\''\)"\);console.log\('\\''db/version:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw1\)\);console.log\('\\''total audit rows \(any league\):'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw2\)\);console.log\('\\''audit rows for 6d13b07f...:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw3\)\);console.log\('\\''audit range:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw4\)\);console.log\('\\''draft_picks for this session:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw5\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const raw1=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT current_database\(\) as db"\);const raw2=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c FROM draft_pick_audit_log"\);const raw3=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT COUNT\(*\)::int AS c FROM draft_pick_audit_log WHERE league_id='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\''"\);const raw4=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT * FROM draft_pick_audit_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3"\);const raw5=await p.$queryRawUnsafe\("SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='\\''public'\\'' AND table_name='\\''draft_picks'\\'' AND column_name IN \('\\''sessionId'\\'','\\''session_id'\\''\)"\);console.log\('\\''db:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw1\)\);console.log\('\\''total audit rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw2\)\);console.log\('\\''audit rows for 6d13b07f:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw3\)\);console.log\('\\''latest audit rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw4\)\);console.log\('\\''draft_picks session cols:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(raw5\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const leagueId='\\''6d13b07f-422d-41cc-8ed0-72793dd5c24d'\\'';const count=await p.draftPickAuditLog.count\({where:{leagueId}}\);const rows=await p.draftPickAuditLog.findMany\({where:{leagueId},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},select:{id:true,action:true,overallPickNumber:true,newPlayerName:true,newRosterId:true,reason:true,createdAt:true,actorUserId:true}}\);const picks=await p.draftPick.findMany\({where:{session:{leagueId}},select:{overall:true,playerName:true,position:true,rosterId:true},orderBy:{overall:'\\''asc'\\''}}\);console.log\('\\''audit count:'\\'',count\);console.log\('\\''audit rows:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);console.log\('\\''picks:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(picks,null,2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'',e.message\);process.exitCode=1;}finally{await p.$disconnect\(\);}}\)\(\);')
